dialogue.text: Are you okay? Get a grip!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thank you for coming to help me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: has been a great deal of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you saying, Namizou...? We're friends.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
